summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: Product-to-Sum & Sum-to-Product Formulas
summary_sections.content_html:
Product-to-Sum & Sum-to-Product Formulas

Product-to-Sum

  • sin A cos B = ¬Ĺ[sin(A+B) + sin(A‚ąíB)]
  • cos A sin B = ¬Ĺ[sin(A+B) ‚ąí sin(A‚ąíB)]
  • cos A cos B = ¬Ĺ[cos(A‚ąíB) + cos(A+B)]
  • sin A sin B = ¬Ĺ[cos(A‚ąíB) ‚ąí cos(A+B)]

Sum-to-Product

  • sin A + sin B = 2 sin((A+B)/2) cos((A‚ąíB)/2)
  • sin A ‚ąí sin B = 2 cos((A+B)/2) sin((A‚ąíB)/2)
  • cos A + cos B = 2 cos((A+B)/2) cos((A‚ąíB)/2)
  • cos A ‚ąí cos B = ‚ąí2 sin((A+B)/2) sin((A‚ąíB)/2)
